title: The Death Eye of Ceylon
writer: Ludwig Bruckmann, Arnaldo Marrosu, Fabrizio Taglioni
actors: Lex Barker, Ann Smyrner, Magali Noël
plot: The action takes place in India where the Maharanee is in big trouble: her husband died and nobody knows where his last wills are hidden. Lex Barker and two raiders want to double-cross the wicked Maharanee.
